hyperedges.label: Brunson Core Persuasion Trio
Advertorial Build Pipeline
Brunson Conversion Framework (Hook-Story-Offer + Big Domino + False Beliefs)
Advertorial Production Pipeline (Interview → JSON → Build → HTML → Shopify)
Romira PEA Multi-Format Advertorial Set
Romira Store + Product + Session Context
Romira PEA Advertorial Family (4 angle variants + product page)
Romira PEA Facebook Ad Funnel (posts -> advertorial -> product)
Advertorial Build Pipeline (content JSON -> build.py -> HTML)
Three PEA Advertorial Variants — Same Product, Different Story Angles
Shopify Section Upload Pipeline — Three Upload Methods
Romira PEA Product Ecosystem — Content + Product Page + Image Prompts
Romira Facebook Ad Funnel: Persona + Posts + Advertorial
Romira Shopify Section Build + Upload Pipeline
Romira Persuasion Content System: Stages + Timeline + Guarantee

nodes.label: Format E Advertorial Pattern
nodes.rationale: All advertorials use format E — a long-form editorial style masquerading as a news/health publication article, with masthead, byline, body blocks, testimonials, and CTA offer section. This format is chosen because it reads like editorial content rather than advertising, increasing cold traffic trust.

nodes.label: Palmitoylethanolamide (PEA) — Body's Pain Regulator
nodes.rationale: PEA is the core mechanism concept across all Romira PEA advertorials. The body produces it naturally; levels drop after 50. Micronized form required for absorption. 47 controlled studies. 60-day cumulative protocol. This rationale underpins the 'why nothing else worked' angle across all four PEA advertorial variants.

nodes.label: Sandra Hughes Persona (Facebook Ad Protagonist)
nodes.rationale: Sandra Hughes is the fictional UGC persona used for all Romira PEA Facebook ad posts. British woman, 55-58, with chronic joint/nerve pain. Used across create_sandra_posts.py, create_top4_posts.py, and create_final4_posts.py as the 'social proof narrator' driving cold traffic to the PEA advertorials.

nodes.label: Shopify Theme GraphQL Mutation Pattern
nodes.rationale: update_lipoic_template.py uses the Shopify Admin GraphQL API (themeFilesUpsert mutation) to push product page templates directly. update_mag2_template.py uses the REST API instead. Two different API approaches for the same goal of updating Shopify product templates.

nodes.label: Dr. Michael Harmon MD — Fictional Pain Doctor Character
nodes.rationale: Dr. Michael Harmon is the fictional authority figure used in the bridge and doctor advertorial variants. 28-year career in pain medicine. His 'confession' framing (I was prescribing the wrong thing) is the credibility/trust mechanism. Shared between content-romira-pea-bridge.json and content-romira-pea-doctor.json.
nodes.norm_label: dr. michael harmon md — fictional pain doctor character

nodes.label: 60-Day Cumulative Protocol Guarantee Rationale
nodes.rationale: The 60-day money-back guarantee is explicitly built around PEA's pharmacology: 35.1% pain reduction in month 1, further 35.4% in month 2 (2024 meta-analysis). Stopping at 30 days misses the biggest gains. This rationale appears in all advertorial content, the product page JSON, and is the core conversion argument against competing 30-day products.

nodes.label: R-Alpha Lipoic Acid Nerve Support Concept
nodes.rationale: R-ALA is the second Romira product. Key mechanism: dual water/fat solubility (universal antioxidant), pure R-form vs cheap racemic S/R mix, paired with organic coconut oil for fat-soluble absorption. Target: nerve tingling/burning at night, over-50 audience. Positioned against CBD/magnesium/turmeric as those hit wrong targets.
nodes.norm_label: r-alpha lipoic acid nerve support concept

nodes.label: Three-Signal Rejection Protocol (Felora Cat Fountain)
nodes.rationale: The Felora advertorial is built around the claim that cats evaluate water sources on three biological signals: smell (biofilm/plastic), sound (motor hum = threat frequency), and physical safety (floor cables = hazard instinct). Most fountains fail all three. Felora addresses all three simultaneously. This is the core mechanism/belief-shift concept for the Felora advertorial.

nodes.label: Shopify Theme Section Upload Workflow
nodes.rationale: Three upload strategies exist: (1) upload.mjs uses Shopify CLI GraphQL mutation via shopify store execute, (2) upload_rest.mjs uses Shopify REST Admin API PUT directly, (3) upload.ps1 uses PowerShell + Shopify CLI. All target the same theme ID 139682218059 on store 3rnv2d-i3.myshopify.com (romira.store).
